name: Golf Dome at the Buffalo Grove Park District
about:
The Golf Dome at the Buffalo Grove Park District is an indoor golf facility offering a climate-controlled environment for year-round play. It operates with a pass-based and membership system, featuring flexible options including a 5-hour pass and a seasonal membership for unlimited winter golfing. The venue is designed for accessibility, with no age restrictions on passes, though children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult. The facility is managed by the Buffalo Grove Park District and is part of a broader community recreation campus.

The pricing structure is tiered to accommodate different usage patterns, with a standard 5-hour pass available for $105 and a discounted rate of $95 when purchased in November. The seasonal pass provides unlimited access throughout the winter season, with strict rules on transferability and use, requiring the passholder's license at check-in and limiting visits to two hours per session. The venue emphasizes convenience and value, with passes that can be shared or borrowed, providing a practical solution for both individuals and groups looking to practice and play.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor access regardless of weather
Flexible pass options that can be shared with friends or family
No age restrictions allowing golfers of all skill levels to play

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food services
No mention of on-site alcohol services

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The provided information does not specify if club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any restrictions on outside food or drinks, but it also does not confirm if they are allowed. It's best to contact the venue directly for clarification.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify a typical duration for 18 holes on their website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly. There are no age restrictions for playing, although children 12 years and under must be accompanied by an adult at all times.
